narration: The min-heap stores the current 2 largest values as we scan the array.
callout: The top is the smaller of the two survivors.

narration: When 5 and 6 arrive, weaker survivors get removed and the heap becomes [5, 6].
decision: Keep heap size equal to k.

narration: The top value 5 is the smallest of the top 2 survivors, which makes it the 2nd largest overall.
